stories.title: Our cheat sheet to the 2026 NFL draft: The prospects, team needs and sleepers you need to know
stories.summary: Who are the biggest sleepers and top QBs? Who is set to get picked early? Here's the ultimate guide to this year's NFL draft, including predictions and buzz.

stories.title: Our NFL draft-day mock: Yates' final predictions for all 32 picks, plus Kiper's notes
stories.summary: Field Yates projects the first 32 draft picks one last time -- including a trade -- and Mel Kiper Jr. shares what he's hearing heading into Round 1.

stories.title: Potential No. 1 pick Dybantsa enters NBA draft
stories.summary: AJ Dybantsa, the projected No. 1 pick this summer, has declared for the 2026 NBA draft, he announced on YouTube.

stories.title: Harper: Phillies must weather storm; Walker cut
stories.summary: Bryce Harper said the Phillies have "got to get through the mud" amid an eight-game losing streak that has resulted in the release of right-hander Taijuan Walker.

stories.title: Pearce OK's intervention program to avoid trial
stories.summary: The Falcons' James Pearce Jr. has agreed to enter an intervention program, allowing him to avoid trial on felony charges stemming from an alleged incident with WNBA player Rickea Jackson.
